gsd.purpose: The GSD (get-shit-done) workflow toolkit. Ships ~50 gsd-* skills, agents, and hooks into ~/.claude/. The settings.json hook entries (gsd-prompt-guard, gsd-context-monitor, gsd-workflow-guard, gsd-statusline, etc.) come from here.

sourced.purpose: Academic-writing framework. Ships the voice/style libraries under ~/.claude/voice/ and ~/.claude/style/ that the agents/voice-extractor.md, prose-drafter.md, source-finder.md, sourced-helper.md sub-agents depend on.
sourced.note: Installed from a private editable repo (pipx install -e <path>). Not auto-installable. If you don't use the sourced framework, you can delete the four agents in agents/ — they're inert without it.
